proposal_text:
Hi,

I build exactly this kind of system — programmatic content generation pipelines at scale.

**What I'd deliver:**
- Python-based pipeline that takes your 22 content templates and generates all 1,200+ pages automatically
- AI-powered content generation (unique, readable text per page — not spun garbage)
- SEO metadata automation: title tags, meta descriptions, schema markup, internal linking structure
- Template engine supporting your crisis-remediation topic clusters
- Deployment pipeline: generate → review → publish in batches
- Built-in quality checks so pages meet Google's helpful content standards

**My stack for this:**
- Python (Jinja2 templates + content generation)
- JavaScript for any frontend/rendering needs
- API integration for AI content generation
- Automated deployment to your hosting platform

**Why me:**
I've built production automation systems that process thousands of items programmatically — data pipelines, content transformation engines, and deployment scripts that run unattended. I understand the difference between "technically generates pages" and "generates pages that actually rank."

I can deliver a working pipeline within 1-2 weeks, with all 1,200 pages generated and ready for review.

Happy to discuss the template structure and your hosting setup.

Best,
Weber Gouin
